race.comment: Tricky race with plenty of chances. MY GREEK GOD (12) has made excellent improvement as he gets deeper into the prep. Rattled late from near last on the turn with an unlucky second over 2145m at Goulburn in BM58 class. Goes up a level for this and gets in light with the 3kg claimer. Leading player. JASPER'S WAY (5) has gone to a new level this time in and stays in contention after his dominant 5.5 len win as fav over 2200m at Dubbo with the 59.5kg. Winning apprentice hops back on and looks up to this despite drawing poorly. MAJORIAN (1) back in grade when he closed late with the big weight to secure third over 2000m at Kembla Grange. Suitably placed again with Dalton's 3kg claim. ELLE HUDSON (4) frustrating gelding who drops sharply in grade after catching the eye with a slashing fourth over 1800m at Rosehill in BM78 class. Placed at the trip and can race much closer from the inside draw. Leading contender.
